question: How do I create an account?
answer: To create an account, click the 'Sign Up' button on the homepage, enter your email address and a strong password, then verify your email via the confirmation link we send you. The process takes under 2 minutes.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your registered email address, and we'll send you a secure reset link valid for 30 minutes. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder or contact support.

question: How do I update my email address?
answer: Go to Settings → Profile → Contact Information. Enter your new email address and click Save. We'll send a confirmation link to your new email to verify the change before it takes effect.

question: Can I have multiple accounts?
answer: Each person is allowed one personal account. However, businesses can create separate team or organisation accounts. Using multiple personal accounts to circumvent limits violates our Terms of Service.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. You'll be asked to confirm your password and acknowledge that all your data will be permanently deleted after a 30-day grace period. This action cannot be undone.

question: Why is my account locked?
answer: Accounts are temporarily locked after 5 failed login attempts for security. The lock lifts automatically after 30 minutes, or you can unlock it immediately via the password reset link sent to your email.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication. Choose between SMS, authenticator app (Google Authenticator or Authy recommended), or email OTP. Authenticator app is the most secure option.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers (for annual enterprise plans). All payments are processed securely through Stripe with 256-bit SSL encryption.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Cancel Subscription. Your plan remains active until the end of your current billing period — you won't be charged again after cancellation. We don't offer partial refunds for unused time.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: We offer a full refund within 14 days of your first purchase if you're not satisfied. After 14 days, refunds are evaluated case-by-case. Contact support@example.com with your order ID to request one.

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Change Plan, select your desired plan, and confirm. The upgrade takes effect immediately and you'll be charged a prorated amount for the remaining billing cycle.

question: Why was I charged twice?
answer: Double charges are rare but can occur due to network errors. Please check your bank statement — sometimes a pending charge and a settled charge appear simultaneously. Contact billing@example.com with your transaction IDs and we'll resolve it within 24 hours.

question: Do you offer discounts for students or nonprofits?
answer: Yes! Students with a valid .edu email get 50% off, and registered nonprofits get 30% off all plans. Apply via our discount portal at example.com/discounts with relevant documentation.

question: Where can I find my invoices?
answer: All invoices are available under Settings → Billing → Invoice History. You can download them as PDF. Invoices are also emailed to your registered address after each payment.

question: What happens if my payment fails?
answer: If a payment fails, we retry it after 3 days, then again after 7 days. You'll receive email notifications each time. If all retries fail, your account is downgraded to the free tier. Update your payment method in Settings → Billing.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: We support the latest two versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. For the best experience, we recommend Chrome or Firefox with JavaScript enabled.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available for iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). It supports all core features including offline mode for previously loaded content. Search for 'ExampleApp' in your app store.

question: How do I report a bug?
answer: Use the in-app feedback button (bottom-right corner) or email bugs@example.com. Please include your browser version, operating system, steps to reproduce, and a screenshot if possible. We aim to acknowledge all bug reports within 24 hours.

question: Why is the app running slowly?
answer: Slow performance is usually caused by browser extensions, a slow internet connection, or an outdated browser. Try clearing your cache (Ctrl+Shift+Delete), disabling extensions, or switching browsers. If the issue persists, contact support.

question: Do you have an API?
answer: Yes, we offer a REST API with full documentation at docs.example.com/api. Free plans get 1,000 API calls/month, Pro plans get 50,000, and Enterprise plans get unlimited. API keys are generated in Settings → Developer.

question: What is your uptime guarantee?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for Pro and Enterprise plans, backed by our SLA. You can check real-time and historical uptime at status.example.com. Free plans do not include an SLA but share the same infrastructure.

question: How do I integrate with third-party tools?
answer: We support native integrations with Slack, Zapier, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, and Salesforce. Go to Settings → Integrations to connect them. For custom integrations, use our REST API or webhook system.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Data → Export. You can export your data as CSV, JSON, or PDF. Exports are prepared asynchronously and emailed to you within 30 minutes depending on data size.

question: How is my data stored and protected?
answer: Your data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. We store data in SOC 2 Type II certified data centres in the US and EU. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

question: Is my data shared with third parties?
answer: We only share data with trusted sub-processors necessary to operate the service (e.g., payment processors, cloud infrastructure). We never sell data. See our full list of sub-processors at example.com/privacy.

question: Are you GDPR compliant?
answer: Yes, we are fully GDPR compliant. EU users can exercise their rights (access, rectification, erasure, portability) via Settings → Privacy or by emailing privacy@example.com. We respond to all requests within 30 days.

question: How do I request my personal data?
answer: Submit a Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) via Settings → Privacy → Request My Data or email privacy@example.com. We'll compile and send you a full copy of your data within 30 days as required by GDPR.

question: Do you use cookies?
answer: We use essential cookies for authentication and performance, and optional analytics cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences via the cookie banner or at Settings → Privacy → Cookie Preferences. We comply with PECR and GDPR cookie regulations.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) is available at checkout for an additional fee. International orders typically take 10–21 business days depending on destination and customs.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 120 countries. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. Note that customers are responsible for any import duties or taxes charged by their country's customs authority.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. Enter it at example.com/track or directly on the carrier's website (UPS, FedEx, or DHL depending on your region) to see real-time updates.

question: What do I do if my order hasn't arrived?
answer: If your order is past the estimated delivery date, first check the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email. If tracking shows no movement for 5+ days, contact support@example.com with your order number and we'll investigate immediately.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging. Sale items and digital products are non-refundable. To initiate a return, visit example.com/returns or contact support.

question: How do I return a product?
answer: Visit example.com/returns, enter your order number and email, select the items to return and the reason, then print the prepaid return label. Drop the package at any authorised carrier location. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days of receiving your return.

question: What if I received a damaged or wrong item?
answer: We sincerely apologise. Email support@example.com within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos of the damage or incorrect item. We'll send a replacement or full refund immediately, no need to return the item.

question: What features are included in the free plan?
answer: The free plan includes up to 3 projects, 5 GB storage, basic analytics, community support, and access to core features. Collaboration tools, advanced analytics, API access, and priority support require a paid plan.

question: What is the difference between Pro and Enterprise plans?
answer: Pro includes unlimited projects, 100 GB storage, advanced analytics, email support, and API access (50K calls/month). Enterprise adds unlimited storage, SSO/SAML, custom SLA, dedicated account manager, and on-premise deployment options.

question: Can I collaborate with my team?
answer: Yes! Pro and Enterprise plans include team collaboration features: shared workspaces, role-based permissions (Admin, Editor, Viewer), real-time co-editing, comments, and activity logs. Invite team members via Settings → Team.

question: Is there an offline mode?
answer: The mobile app supports offline mode for content you've previously loaded — you can view and edit it without an internet connection. Changes sync automatically when you reconnect. The web app requires an active connection.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us via live chat (bottom-right of any page), email at support@example.com, or our help centre at help.example.com. Pro users get priority response within 4 hours; free users within 24 hours.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Live chat is available Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM EST. Email support is available 24/7 with responses within 24 hours (4 hours for Pro/Enterprise). Our help centre and community forum are available around the clock.

question: Do you offer onboarding or training?
answer: Yes! All users get access to our video tutorial library and documentation. Pro users get a free 30-minute onboarding call. Enterprise users get a dedicated onboarding programme with custom training sessions.
